info.title: Kavenio Social Posting SDK API
info.description: Generated OpenAPI document for Kavenio SDKs that support social posting, media, account connection, validation, and scheduling workflows.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, schedule, update, and manage post lifecycle actions.

tags.name: Queue
tags.description: Manage reusable post queue schedules and preview slots.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Upload, presign, and validate media assets.

tags.name: Validation
tags.description: Validate post payloads and platform content length limits.

tags.name: Connect
tags.description: Start and complete account connection flows.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Manage connected social accounts and account health.

get.description: Returns the profiles available to the authenticated organization.

post.description: Creates a customer-owned profile grouping.

example.name: Retail campaigns
example.description: Campaigns managed by the retail team.

409.description: A profile with this name already exists.

get.description: Returns one profile by ID.

put.description: Updates profile fields for an existing customer-owned grouping.

409.description: A profile with this name already exists.

patch.description: Partially updates profile fields for an existing customer-owned grouping.

409.description: A profile with this name already exists.
Profile cannot be deleted in its current state.

get.description: Returns posts for the authenticated organization, optionally filtered by profile, account, platform, status, search text, or date range.

post.description: Creates a draft, scheduled post, queue-backed post, or immediate publish request depending on the payload fields.

example.title: Launch announcement
example.content: We are launching the new campaign today.

409.description: Post request conflicts with current state.

post.description: Creates posts from CSV content and returns per-row creation or validation results.

get.description: Returns a post by ID, including platform target state.

put.description: Updates editable fields on an existing post and returns the resulting post state.

409.description: Post cannot be updated in its current state.

patch.description: Partially updates editable fields on an existing post and returns the resulting post state.

409.description: Post cannot be updated in its current state.

delete.description: Deletes a post by ID and returns the deletion count.

409.description: Post cannot be deleted in its current state.

post.description: Retries failed platform targets for a post, optionally limited to specific target IDs.

409.description: Post cannot be retried in its current state.

post.description: Starts unpublishing for published platform targets, optionally limited to specific target IDs.

409.description: Post cannot be unpublished in its current state.

post.description: Applies supported lifecycle edits to published platform targets and returns the resulting post state.

409.description: Post cannot be edited in its current state.

get.description: Returns queue schedules for a profile, optionally filtered to one queue.

post.description: Creates a reusable posting queue schedule for a profile.

409.description: Queue schedule conflicts with current state.

put.description: Updates a reusable posting queue schedule and returns the resulting schedule.

409.description: Queue schedule conflicts with current state.

delete.description: Deletes a reusable posting queue schedule by profile and queue ID.

get.description: Returns upcoming scheduled times for a profile queue without creating posts.
Returns the next scheduled posting slot for a profile queue. The response uses the queue preview shape with at most one slot.

post.description: Validates a post payload against platform and scheduling rules without creating a post.
Returns character counts and per-platform length validity for the supplied text.

example.text: Short post text for platform length validation.

get.description: Handles provider OAuth redirects for hosted connect flows and redirects back to the Kavenio app with the connection result.

302.description: Redirects to the configured Kavenio app completion URL with connection status query parameters.

get.description: Returns social and ads providers available to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates an OAuth connect session and returns the provider authorization URL.

409.description: Provider cannot be connected in the current state.

post.description: Completes an OAuth connect session using the provider authorization code.

409.description: Connect session cannot be completed.

post.description: Connects a provider that requires user-supplied token credentials. Raw tokens are accepted only in the request and are never returned.

409.description: Provider cannot be connected in the current state.

post.description: Connects a Bluesky account using an identifier and app password. The app password is accepted only in the request and is never returned.

409.description: Bluesky account cannot be connected.

post.description: Connects a Telegram bot or chat using supplied credentials. The bot token is accepted only in the request and is never returned.

409.description: Telegram account cannot be connected.

get.description: Returns Facebook Pages available from a connected Facebook account.

post.description: Selects a Facebook Page destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or Page not found.

get.description: Returns Instagram business or creator accounts available from a connected account.

post.description: Selects an Instagram account destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or Instagram account not found.

get.description: Returns LinkedIn organizations available from a connected LinkedIn account.

post.description: Selects a LinkedIn organization destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or organization not found.

get.description: Returns Pinterest boards available from a connected Pinterest account.

post.description: Selects a Pinterest board destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or board not found.

get.description: Returns Reddit subreddits available from a connected Reddit account.
Returns post flair choices for a connected Reddit account and subreddit.

404.description: Connected account or subreddit not found.

get.description: Returns YouTube channels available from a connected YouTube account.

post.description: Selects a YouTube channel destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or channel not found.

get.description: Returns YouTube playlists available from a connected YouTube account.
Returns Google Business locations available during account connection.

post.description: Selects a Google Business location destination and attaches it to a profile.

404.description: Connected account or location not found.

get.description: Returns connected social accounts for the authenticated organization.
Returns one connected account by ID.

put.description: Updates editable connected account fields. Public metadata updates must not include provider credential fields.

409.description: Connected account cannot be updated.

patch.description: Partially updates editable connected account fields. Public metadata updates must not include provider credential fields.

409.description: Connected account cannot be updated.

post.description: Moves a connected account to another profile.

404.description: Connected account or profile not found.

409.description: Connected account cannot be moved.

post.description: Disconnects a connected account and returns the resulting account state.

409.description: Connected account cannot be disconnected.

post.description: Refreshes account health and readiness information for a connected account.
Refreshes TikTok creator information and posting readiness for a connected account.
Uploads one or more base64-encoded media items and returns public URLs.
Creates a short-lived upload URL and public media URL for direct upload workflows.
Validates a public media URL and returns content type, size, type, and platform limit information when available.
